_note: Webscorer JSON API settings. Credentials are NOT stored here - they come from GitHub Secrets (WEBSCORER_API_ID / WEBSCORER_API_TOKEN) at runtime. This file is safe to commit.
_countMode: CONFIRMED by the probe run of 19 July 2026: the registration lists expose only Distance, Email, Name and Wave - there is no team field, and one row is one team entry (108 rows matched the 108 teams reported at the time). So 'rows' is correct. 'distinctTeam' would only apply if each row were an individual racer.
_teamField: Not present in these lists - the probe found no Team/TeamName field, so 'Name' is the team's own name. This also means team SIZE (members per team) is not available from this API.
_distanceField: Field name holding the course. Falls back to 'Category' if 'Distance' is absent.

courseMap._note: Matched case-insensitively against the distance/category value, IN THIS ORDER. Order matters: 'half-a-half' must be tested before 'half', or every Half-a-Half entry would be miscounted as Half.
